title: ipomoea fulvovillosa
intro: Ipomoea fulvovillosa, also known as the Yellow Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea fulvovillosa include its potential to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea fulvovillosa include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
